name: Suspicious Traffic Upstyle Backdoor
description: This alert is triggered when traffic matching a known Command and Control pattern related to Traffic Backdoor.Python.UPSTYLE.A is observed. Backdoor.Python.UPSTYLE.A is a Backdoor that targets the Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS. It is reported that this malware has been used in targeted attack(s), arriving onto the infected system via the exploitation of the 0-day tracked under CVE-2024-3400.
author: Brandon Shores
